title: Viscose Bamboo Queen Mattress Topper — Cooling Mattress Pad
summary: This viscose-from-bamboo mattress topper is designed to add a cooling, plush layer to any mattress. Our research suggests bamboo-derived fabric is naturally more breathable than synthetic alternatives, making this topper particularly popular among hot sleepers.
pros: Soft and plush — adds comfort without changing mattress feel dramatically
Deep pocket skirt fits mattresses up to 21 inches
cons: May shift slightly without a non-slip mattress pad underneath
Not as thick as dedicated memory foam toppers
Bamboo feel diminishes slightly after multiple washes
Not suitable for those who prefer a firmer sleep surface
bestFor: Hot sleepers who wake up overheated
Those wanting to extend the life of an aging mattress
Allergy sufferers who need hypoallergenic bedding
Guest bedrooms needing a quick comfort upgrade
verdict: For hot sleepers on a budget, this bamboo mattress topper delivers a noticeable improvement in sleep temperature. Our research confirms it's a popular, well-reviewed option that outperforms standard polyester toppers in breathability.
